goal: Skip the App Store Connect export-compliance prompt on every build
root_cause: Info.plist lacked ITSAppUsesNonExemptEncryption, so each uploaded build showed the 'Missing export compliance' warning in ASC and required a manual Manage→No answer before submission.
fix: Added <key>ITSAppUsesNonExemptEncryption</key><false/> — the app uses only standard HTTPS/TLS (Supabase, CDN), no custom/non-exempt crypto, which qualifies for the exemption.
verified: plist edited; takes effect on the next Archive. Native config file (not a www mirror) so edited in ios/ directly; cap sync does not overwrite it.
notes: FOUNDER: the build already in ASC (Build 1) predates this session's www fixes and this key — do NOT submit it; Archive a fresh build which bundles latest code + this key (no warning).

goal: Deck switcher showed the sign-in gate to already-logged-in users; add signed-in streak-chip progress bar + next-reward popup
root_cause: On the board pages (daily/full/question) init() never called getCurrentUser()/getSupabaseClient(), so the Supabase client was never created on load → the saved session was never restored → getCurrentUserSync() returned null even for logged-in users. The deck switcher and streak chip both read getCurrentUserSync() and treated everyone as logged out (deck pill → sign-in gate, chip → 'Save your fortune').
fix: (1) init() now calls subscribeAuthState(onAuthSettled) + getCurrentUser() on every page so the client is created and the session restored; onAuthSettled re-renders the chip + deck name. (2) renderStreakChip: bound a SINGLE click handler that routes by LIVE state (avoids a stale logged-out gate listener firing after login); signed-in + next milestone now shows a mini progress bar in the chip and tap opens showRewardPopup. (3) showRewardPopup: centered modal with the next deck art, name, progress bar, 'Day X of Y' and 'N days to go'. New i18n keys rewardPopupTitle/rewardDaysToGo/rewardKeepGoing (EN+TH) with inline fallbacks. Cache-bust bumped ?v=20260619a→b across all app pages.
verified: chrome MCP @390: vendor/supabase.js now loads on daily.html (client created — the fix); no console errors; reward popup renders (centered, gradient bar, Day 11 of 14 / 3 days to go); logged-out deck pill correctly opens the sign-in gate. Logged-in session-restore path not automatable (needs real Google auth) but mechanism mirrors the working home-page pattern.
notes: common.js is imported (no ?v) so the bump won't refetch it via Cloudflare — mitigated because every new key has an inline EN/TH fallback in main.js.

goal: Move account deletion to the very bottom under a collapsed 'Other', open a checkbox-gated confirm modal; remove redundant 'Save your journey' CTA
root_cause: Delete account sat inline in the identity card near the top (easy to hit by accident) and the bottom 'Save your journey' CTA duplicated the identity card + history empty-state sign-in nudges.
fix: profile.js: removed the inline delete block from renderIdentity; renderOther now renders a collapsed <details> 'Other' disclosure (signed-in only, already last in the DOM) revealing a 'Delete account' button → openDeleteModal() opens a centered overlay with the warning, an explicit checkbox, and a checkbox-gated 'Yes, delete' + 'Cancel'. renderLoginCta gutted to hide #profile-cta (removed 'Save your journey'). Added profileDeleteFinalBody/profileDeleteCheckbox i18n (EN+TH) + .profile-other-disclosure / .profile-delete-overlay / .profile-delete-modal CSS.
verified: chrome MCP @390 profile: 'Other ▾' disclosure renders at the bottom, expands to 'Delete account'; injected modal markup matches openDeleteModal output and renders centered (warning + checkbox + disabled 'Yes, delete' + Cancel); confirm button starts disabled (checkbox-gated); 'Save your journey' text absent + #profile-cta hidden. deleteAccount() call path unchanged (already device-tested by founder).
notes: Apple 5.1.1(v): deletion still reachable (Profile → Other → Delete account) and actually deletes server-side.
